# widget-knob-load-bearing

## CLAIM

The wibble knob is load-bearing across configurations — varying it dominates other knobs in the wibble score.

## EVIDENCE

- [v2-tuned](../results/v2-tuned.md) — knob=1.5 vs knob=1.0 jumped wibble 0.72 → 0.84.

## CONFIDENCE

medium — single project, two-knob comparison.

## SCOPE

Tested on widget-tuning. Conjectured to generalise to widget-classification.

## SUPERSEDES

none
